'''jadadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaetoblast|chaetoblast]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-d-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaetoblast|chaetoblast]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jadadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jædædhæth|jædædhæth]] || [[word:jædædhæj|jædædhæj]] || [[word:jædædhæsh|jædædhæsh]] || [[word:jædædhæ|jædædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jadadadhath|jadadadhath]] || [[word:jadadadhaj|jadadadhaj]] || [[word:jadadadhash|jadadadhash]] || [[word:jadadadha|jadadadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jadadhath|jadadhath]] || [[word:jadadhaj|jadadhaj]] || [[word:jadadhash|jadadhash]] || [[word:jadadha|jadadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jadafdhath|jadafdhath]] || [[word:jadafdhaj|jadafdhaj]] || [[word:jadafdhash|jadafdhash]] || [[word:jadafdhaf|jadafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jadadhatha|jadadhatha]] || [[word:jadadhaja|jadadhaja]] || [[word:jadadhasha|jadadhasha]] || [[word:jadadhaka|jadadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jadadhath|jadadhath]] || [[word:jadadhaj|jadadhaj]] || [[word:jadadhash|jadadhash]] || [[word:jadadha|jadadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jadadhathal|jadadhathal]] || [[word:jadadhajal|jadadhajal]] || [[word:jadadhashal|jadadhashal]] || [[word:jadadhakal|jadadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jadadhathatha|jadadhathatha]] || [[word:jadadhajaja|jadadhajaja]] || [[word:jadadhashasha|jadadhashasha]] || [[word:jadadhaka|jadadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jadadhathan|jadadhathan]] || [[word:jadadhajan|jadadhajan]] || [[word:jadadhashan|jadadhashan]] || [[word:jadadhakan|jadadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jadadhathaoro|jadadhathaoro]] || [[word:jadadhajaoro|jadadhajaoro]] || [[word:jadadhashaoro|jadadhashaoro]] || [[word:jadadhakaoro|jadadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
